debug_info.goal:
pbar : Pose
ε : ℝ
poly : GoodPoly
pc : GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition poly pbar ε
P : Euc(3)
⊢ ‖P‖ * nth_partial 0 (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer pbar ε poly P pc) pbar.outerParams =
    inner ℝ (pbar.rotM₂θ P) (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc)

failed_attempts:
have hP : 0 ≠ ‖P‖ := by
    intro h
    have := poly.nontriv P (by simp [Finset.mem_image, Finset.mem_univ])
    simp_all
  simp only [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, nth_partial]
  rw [fderiv_div_const _ (ne_of_gt (norm_pos_iff.mpr hP))]
  simp [rotM, rotM_mat, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]
  rfl

have := poly.vertex_radius_le_one P (by simp)
  have hP : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := by
    intro h
    have := poly.nontriv P (by simp)
    rw [h] at this
    exact lt_irrefl _ this
  simp only [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, Fin.isValue]
  field_simp [hP]
  simp [rotproj_outer_unit, rotM, rotM_mat, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]
  rfl

have := pc.norm_S_ne_zero
  simp only [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, Fin.isValue]
  unfold rotproj_outer_unit
  have hP : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := by
    have := poly.nontriv P (by sorry)
    exact ne_of_lt this
  field_simp [hP]
  rw [← HasFDerivAt.fderiv_eq_fderiv]
  have := Differentiable.rotM P
  have := Differentiable.inner ℝ this (by fun_prop)
  have := this.hasFDerivAt pbar.outerParams
  simp [rotM, rotM_mat, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail] at *
  sorry

have := poly.vertex_radius_le_one P (by simp)
  have hP : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := by
    refine ne_of_gt ?_
    exact poly.nontriv P (by simp)
  simp only [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, nth_partial]
  rw [div_eq_mul_inv]
  have hf : DifferentiableAt ℝ (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w) pbar.outerParams := by
    apply DifferentiableAt.div
    · fun_prop
    · exact contDiff_const.differentiableAt
    · exact fun _ ↦ hP.symm
  rw [hf.fderiv_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_smul', mul_comm]
  field_simp [hP]
  simp [rotM, rotM_mat, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]
  rfl

have := poly.norm_P_ne_zero P (by aesop)
  simp only [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, Fin.isValue]
  field_simp [this]
  rw [← HasFDerivAt.inner_fderiv_const]
  congr 1
  ext i
  fin_cases i <;> simp [rotM, rotM_mat, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]
